 {"id":"frankenredis-mmg","title":"Implement SHUTDOWN graceful server termination","description":"## Problem

fr-command/src/lib.rs line 10729: SHUTDOWN command returns OK but does not actually shut down the server. The comment says: \"Stub -- in production this would trigger graceful shutdown\".

## What Redis Does

SHUTDOWN [NOSAVE | SAVE] [NOW] [FORCE] [ABORT]:
1. Optionally triggers a final SAVE (RDB snapshot)
2. Flushes AOF if configured
3. Closes all client connections gracefully
4. Exits the process

SHUTDOWN ABORT cancels a pending shutdown.
SHUTDOWN NOSAVE skips the final snapshot.

## Implementation Plan

Since SHUTDOWN is a runtime-special command, it needs to signal the server event loop to begin graceful termination:

1. Add a shutdown_requested flag to ServerState
2. SHUTDOWN handler sets the flag (and optionally triggers SAVE)
3. fr-server main loop checks the flag each tick
4. On shutdown: flush writes, close connections, drop listener, exit

## Files to Modify

- crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: ServerState flag, SHUTDOWN handler logic
- crates/fr-server/src/main.rs: Check flag in main loop, graceful exit","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:10:45.912067485Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:45:05.661284398Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:45:05.660779813Z","close_reason":"SHUTDOWN: sets shutdown_requested flag, server event loop exits gracefully with optional final SAVE","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-mzff","title":"Allow no-op TLS runtime reapply when enabled config is unchanged","description":"plan_tls_runtime_apply currently returns ConnectionTypeConfigureViolation for an unchanged enabled TLS config because it rejects any enabled target with requires_connection_type_configure == false. That breaks idempotent runtime planning for no-op reapply paths. Add a regression test and only require connection-type configure when the listener/config actually changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-02T03:25:59.646657002Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-02T03:29:10.898834669Z","closed_at":"2026-04-02T03:29:10.898605846Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-mzru","title":"Cleanup replication/monitor state on client disconnect","description":"Stale replica/monitor client IDs persist after disconnect, skewing INFO replication and wasting monitor work. Remove replica/monitor state when a client closes; refresh ack snapshots.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-11T13:50:37.737410187Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-11T14:01:09.345979378Z","closed_at":"2026-04-11T14:01:09.345654600Z","close_reason":"Cleaned replica/monitor state on disconnect; added regression test.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
